title: ilex cyrtura
intro: Ilex cyrtura, also known as Taiwan holly, is a shrub native to Taiwan, characterized by its dark green, leathery leaves and small white flowers. The leaves and berries of Ilex cyrtura have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The leaves and berries can be prepared into teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and are also sometimes used in herbal supplements.
